heading: Duty to notify sex offenders of registration requirements and to register
label: 20919 Duty to notify sex offenders of registration requirements and to register
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in subsec. (a)(1), was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , known as the Sex Offender Registration and Notification Act. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title of 2006 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 109–248120 Stat. 590section 10101 of this titleJuly 27, 2006
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 16917 of Title 42
amendments: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in subsec. (a)(1), was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , known as the Sex Offender Registration and Notification Act. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title of 2006 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 109–248120 Stat. 590section 10101 of this titleJuly 27, 2006

children.text: inform the sex offender of the duties of a sex offender under this subchapter and explain those duties;
require the sex offender to read and sign a form stating that the duty to register has been explained and that the sex offender understands the registration requirement; and
ensure that the sex offender is registered.

children.heading: Notification of sex offenders who cannot comply with subsection (a)
children.label: b Notification of sex offenders who cannot comply with subsection (a)
children.text: The Attorney General shall prescribe rules for the notification of sex offenders who cannot be registered in accordance with subsection (a).
